violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed no cover on the gravy and hashbrowns in the reach in coolers.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed tator tots and garlic toast on the floor in walk in freezer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed numerous items not dated marked in cooler such as dressing, gravy, hashbrowns.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Observed eggs salad sandwiches, bacon turkey sandwich and cold chicken was pasted the 10 day calendar. Employee volunteered disregarded them.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in cooler and walk in cooler needs to be cleaned more frequently.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed floors through out kitchen areas that needs to be clean more frequently.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed walls in the kitchen that needs to be cleaned more frequently.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. Observed fly strips hanging from the ceiling in the kitchen area.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Display cooler had missing dates on several products.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Observed 2 refrigerators without thermometer. Corrected on site.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cooler floor, surface around grill and cooking equipment, refrigerator needs cleaning more frequently.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed filters in ventilation hood needs cleaning more frequently.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items . Observed walk in cooler without shield on light.
